Title: IWS - Verify device recovers from interrupted firmware update (power loss)
2. Design deployed to Core with an IWS component.
3. IWS device is on the network, inventory item name matches device name in Configurator.
4. The IWS device is running an older firmware version than what the Core provides.
Preconditions: 1. Deploy a design with a newer firmware version to the Core, triggering the automatic firmware update on the IWS device.

Title: 2. While the firmware update is in progress (approximately 50% complete), disconnect power from the IWS device.
4. Reconnect power to the IWS device.
5. Wait for the device to boot.
6. Observe the device status and behavior.
Preconditions: 1. The device does not brick (become permanently non-functional).

Title: 2. The device boots into either its previous firmware version or a recovery mode.
3. The device is discoverable on the network after power restoration.
4. A firmware update can be reattempted and completed successfully.
5. After a successful firmware update, the device reaches "OK" state.
